questions.question: What is the purpose of the `extern` keyword in C++ when used with a function or variable declaration, and what is the purpose of the `static` keyword?
questions.hint: Explain the difference between static and extern in C++

questions.question: Write a C++ code snippet that declares and uses a function with internal linkage (i.e., using the `static` keyword) and another function with external linkage (i.e., without the `static` or `extern` keyword).
questions.hint: Focus on the declaration and usage of static and extern keywords

questions.question: What is the difference between `__declspec(dllexport)` and `extern`, and how do they affect the linkage of a C++ function or variable?
questions.hint: Explain the difference between these keywords in C++
